channel.title: Cloudflare R2 Incidents
channel.description: RSS feed of Cloudflare incidents related to R2

item.title: R2 and Durable Objects increased errors in Eastern North America
item.description:
The increase in errors are resolved and the services are stable again.
Customers using Queues, Cache Reserve and Cache Purge API may have also been impacted.

item.title: R2 and Durable Objects increased errors in Eastern North America
item.description:
The increase in errors are resolved and the services are stable again.
Customers using Queues, Cache Reserve and Cache Purge API may have also been impacted.

item.title: R2 and Durable Objects increased errors in Eastern North America
item.description:
The increase in errors are resolved and the services are stable again.
Customers using Queues, Cache Reserve and Cache Purge API may have also been impacted.
